prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年南开大学在北京综合类最低录取位次分别为约1898名、2202名、2269名、2118名、2331名。整体呈波动后移趋势，2021至2025年累计后移约433名；近3年（2023–2025）位次在2118–2331之间波动，2025年基准位次约2331名；该校在北京本科批招生计划2021–2024年均为48人，2025年增至49人；2026年计划48人，较2025年减少1人，属小幅缩招，理论上使竞争略有加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年主榜第21名，近年排名稳定在20–23名区间，属于国内顶尖高校层次；2026年高考周期内声誉评价为"明显负面"，主要涉及学术不端（院长论文造假被免职、多位教师被实名举报）及师德师风事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制作用；抖音热度排名第36位（较热），短视频平台曝光量中等偏上，关注度尚可；历史投档异常方面，2022年曾在河南出现严重断档，但北京近年未出现明显断档记录；第五轮学科评估中，南开大学拥有化学A+、工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、数学A+、统计学A、理论经济学A、中国语言文学A、物理学A、生物学A、马克思主义理论A、世界史A、中国史A、政治学A、环境科学与工程A-等14个A-及以上学科，学科实力极为突出，对高分考生有持续吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 南开大学优势学科对应的金融/财经/经济类专业社会热度呈"分化观望"（2026年），数学/统计类为"推荐"，计算机/电子信息类为"高热推荐"；化学/生物/材料类（生化环材）仍属"明显劝退"。北京市2026年普通高考考生总数约84900人，较2025年65434人增长约29.7%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧；省控线数据（2025年本科批430分）未纳入2026年预测，因2026年省控线尚未公布；南开大学位于天津市，与北京地缘相近，北京考生对天津高校有较强地域偏好；该校在北京招生计划占其全国总招生比例较小（2023年约1.2%），属跨省招生，本地保护效应不明显。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年招生计划小幅缩招（48人 vs 49人）、北京市考生人数大幅增长（+29.7%）带来的竞争加剧、学校顶尖层次与优势学科的持续吸引力，以及2026年声誉负面事件的潜在抑制作用，在2025年基准位次2331名基础上，预计2026年最低录取位次小幅前移。预测最低位次约2252名，乐观区间约1931名，保守区间约2573名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、统计学、数据科学）
- 金融学类（含金融学、保险学（保险与精算））。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 经济学类（含经济学、国际经济与贸易、财政学、商务经济学）
- 工科试验班（信息科学与技术）（含计算机科学与技术、信息安全、自动化、智能科学与技术、软件工程）
- 理科试验班（物理与光电信息技术工程）（含物理学、应用物理学、光电信息科学与工程、电子信息科学与技术）
- 理科试验班（物质科学）（含化学、应用化学、生物科学、材料物理、材料化学）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 法学
- 历史学类（含历史学、世界史、考古学）
- 中国语言文学类（含汉语言文学、汉语国际教育）
- 哲学类（含哲学、逻辑学）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（约1931–2573名）内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（约2000名以内）可重点冲击一档的理科试验班（数学与大数据）和金融学类；位次在区间中段（约2200–2400名）应以二档的工科试验班（信息科学与技术）、经济学类等为主；位次接近区间上限（约2500名）建议以三档专业保底，同时可关注二档中位次相对友好的专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Nankai University in Beijing's comprehensive category were approximately 1898, 2202, 2269, 2118, and 2331 respectively. Overall, there is a fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 433 places from 2021 to 2025; in the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated between 2118 and 2331, with a baseline ranking of about 2331 in 2025; the university's enrollment plan in Beijing's undergraduate batch was 48 students from 2021 to 2024, increasing to 49 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 48 students, a decrease of 1 compared to 2025, representing a slight reduction in enrollment, theoretically intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks 21st in the 2026 main list of the Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 20–23 range in recent years, belonging to the top tier of domestic universities; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is "significantly negative," mainly involving academic misconduct (dean's paper fabrication leading to dismissal, multiple teachers being publicly reported) and teacher ethics incidents, which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms and moderate attention; regarding historical admission anomalies, there was a serious gap in Henan in 2022, but no obvious gap records in Beijing in recent years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Nankai University has 14 A- and above disciplines including Chemistry A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Mathematics A+, Statistics A, Theoretical Economics A, Chinese Language and Literature A, Physics A, Biology A, Marxist Theory A, World History A, Chinese History A, Political Science A, and Environmental Science and Engineering A-, with extremely outstanding disciplinary strength, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of finance/economics majors corresponding to Nankai University's advantageous disciplines is "differentiated and wait-and-see" (2026), mathematics/statistics majors are "recommended," and computer/electronic information majors are "highly recommended"; chemistry/biology/materials majors (biochemistry, environmental science, chemistry, materials) are still "clearly discouraged." The total number of regular college entrance examination candidates in Beijing in 2026 is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% compared to 65,434 in 2025, with a significant expansion in candidate scale and intensified competition; provincial control line data (2025 undergraduate batch 430 points) is not included in the 2026 prediction because the 2026 provincial control line has not yet been announced; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, geographically close to Beijing, and Beijing candidates have a strong regional preference for Tianjin universities; the university's enrollment plan in Beijing accounts for a small proportion of its total national enrollment (about 1.2% in 2023), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no obvious local protection effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan (48 vs 49), the intensified competition due to a significant increase in Beijing candidates (+29.7%), the continuous attraction of the university's top tier and advantageous disciplines, and the potential inhibitory effect of negative reputation events in 2026, based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 2331, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward. The predicted minimum ranking is about 2252, with an optimistic range of about 1931 and a conservative range of about 2573.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Statistics, Data Science)
- Finance (including Finance, Insurance (Insurance and Actuarial Science)).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Economics (including Economics, International Economics and Trade, Public Finance, Business Economics)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (including Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Automation, Intelligent Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (including Physics, Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science) (including Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Science, Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Law
- History (including History, World History, Archaeology)
- Chinese Language and Literature (including Chinese Language and Literature, Chinese International Education)
- Philosophy (including Philosophy, Logic).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range (approximately 1931–2573), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within about 2000), focus on Tier 1 Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) and Finance; if the ranking is in the middle of the range (about 2200–2400), focus on Tier 2 Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) and Economics; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (about 2500), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors with relatively friendly rankings.
